response.overview: Late for School is a 2019 independent science-fiction short film created by Kane Parsons, who wrote, directed, produced, edited, and starred in the project. Blending surreal imagery, atmospheric storytelling, and experimental filmmaking techniques, the film follows a mysterious and dreamlike approach that reflects many of the creative ideas later associated with Parsons’ work. Created years before his worldwide success with The Backrooms, Late for School showcased his early fascination with liminal environments, unsettling spaces, science-fiction concepts, and immersive visual storytelling. Despite its small-scale production, the short gained attention among fans of Parsons’ work for its distinctive atmosphere and ambitious style. Today, Late for School is often viewed as an important early project that helped shape the creative identity and cinematic techniques that would later define Kane Pixels’ most recognized productions.
response.title: Late for School
